meaning: adj.无法解脱的,逃脱不掉的,解不开的
examples: Meetings are an inextricable part of business.
Life is a mystery, an inextricable mystery for human society.
And then there is the inextricable link between energy and agriculture.
Gupta : He is drawing an inextricable relationship between the economy and health care.
For cultural diversity is based on two inextricable processes: one internal and the other external.
